Container.Name: LeafWiki
Container.Overview: LeafWiki is a self-hosted wiki that runs as a single Go binary with SQLite storage and Markdown pages on disk. No external database required. Supports nested pages, file attachments, full-text search, and role-based access control.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: JWT signing secret — required. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Path where LeafWiki stores pages, attachments, and the SQLite database.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the LeafWiki web interface.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error.

Config.Name: Disable Auth
Config.Description: Set to true to disable authentication. Only use on fully trusted, isolated networks.
